violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. -Frozen pizzas in a cardboard box are stored on the floor of the freezer.

Reheating food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not reheated rapidly so all parts reached a temperature of 165F for 15 seconds within one hour. -The Meat balls for subway were holding at 115-225F (in the line warmer) at the time of inspection. They were microwaved and put out during the inspection but never temped by the employee. The establishment removed the meatballs to fix the infraction.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. -In the Hunt Bros Pizza area the prep table was not cleaned under the cutting board frequently enough. A build up of food crumbs were found.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
